ground_truth_requirements.text: It requires a graphical display of at least 800*600 resolution.

ground_truth_requirements.text: It must run with all the operating systems that Qt supports.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The user must undo and redo its last thousand actions.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the user must undo and redo its last thousand actions

ground_truth_requirements.text: The product must count and display the time that the user uses to play.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The product must count and display the number of the user' asction.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The product must record the score (time and number of counts) of a play associated with the name of a user.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The product must display a window with all the player' scores.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The hardware and operating system must provide an 800x600 screen resolution.
